page.text: 1 CONNECTION HAS BEEN DESIGNED TO CATER FOR FOLLOWING SHEAR STRENGTH.
PROVIDED FOR SEC. BEAM > M8250 / MC250
PROVIDED FOR SEC. BEAM > MB250 / MC250
VALID FOR SEC. BEAM AS CHANNELS ONLY
ALL WELDS SHALL BE 6 mm. THK. UNLESS NOTED OTHERWISE.
2 NO AXIAL FORCES ARE INCLUDED AND SHALL BE CHECKED AS PER ACTUAL DESIGN.
3 THIS STANDARD IS NOT APPLICABLE FOR COMBINATION OF BEAM MKD.
4 SHEAR CAPACITY GIVEN IN THE TABLE IS FOR CONNECTION- TYPE IV, V & VI.
5 CONNECTION TYPE I, II, III, VII, VIII & IX SHALL NOT BE USED FOR EQUIPMENT
